title: IP Whitelist Access Control Success
description: Verify that users with allowed IP addresses can access the system successfully.

steps.description: Simulate a login request from a whitelisted IP address.
Enter valid username and password credentials.
Submit the login request.
Verify that access is granted and the user proceeds to the unit selection panel or dashboard.

title: IP Whitelist Access Control Deny
description: Verify that users from IP addresses not on the whitelist are denied access.

steps.description: Simulate a login request from a non-whitelisted IP address.
Enter valid username and password credentials.
Submit the login request.
Ensure access is denied with a proper error message indicating IP restriction.

title: User Authentication with Correct Credentials
description: Validate login succeeds with valid username and password combination.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page.
Enter valid username.
Enter correct password.
Click the login button.
Confirm that login is successful and user is redirected appropriately.

title: User Authentication with Incorrect Credentials
description: Verify the system rejects login attempts with invalid credentials.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page.
Enter a valid username.
Enter an incorrect password.
Click the login button.
Verify login fails with an error message indicating invalid credentials.

title: Brute-force Attack Prevention
description: Ensure the system blocks or delays login after multiple failed login attempts to prevent brute-force attacks.

steps.description: Attempt to login with incorrect password more than allowed threshold times consecutively.
Verify further attempts are throttled or blocked with an appropriate notification or delay.

title: Role-Based Access Control Enforcement
description: Validate that users only see menus and content based on their assigned roles.

steps.description: Login as a user assigned to a specific role.
Verify menus and content displayed match the permissions assigned to the user's role.
Attempt to access restricted pages or functionalities not permitted for the role.
Verify access is denied and appropriate error or redirection occurs.

title: Multi-Unit Selection Panel Functionality
description: Ensure users assigned to multiple units can select and switch active units properly.

steps.description: Login with a user assigned to multiple units.
Verify unit selection panel is displayed upon login.
Select one of the units from the panel.
Verify user is redirected to the selected unit's dashboard and menus are loaded accordingly.
Switch to another unit.
Confirm the unit context changes and relevant content and menus update dynamically.

title: Audit Log Capture for Critical Actions
description: Verify that all critical user and admin actions are recorded in audit logs with timestamps.

steps.description: Perform critical actions such as login, role assignment, unit creation, file upload, and system setting changes.
Check audit logs contain accurate, time-stamped entries for each action performed.

title: Encryption of User Passwords and Files
description: Confirm that user passwords and uploaded files are encrypted with AES-256 algorithm.

steps.description: Register or update a user password.
Verify password is stored encrypted and cannot be retrieved in plain text.
Upload a file via the portal.
Confirm file data is encrypted on server using AES-256.

title: User and Audit Log Data Export to Excel
description: Validate export functionality for user, unit, and audit log data to Excel format works properly including row limits.

steps.description: Navigate to export data section in admin panel.
Initiate export for user data, unit data, and audit logs separately.
Verify Excel files are generated and downloadable with correct format and data.
Ensure exported data does not exceed system row limits and complete data is included.

title: System Maintenance Mode Access Control
description: Check that when maintenance mode is enabled, only authorized users can access the system and others see maintenance message.

steps.description: Activate system maintenance mode.
Attempt login as an unauthorized regular user.
Verify user is blocked access and sees maintenance mode message.
Attempt login as an authorized maintenance or admin user.
Confirm allowed user can access system successfully.
Verify that all access attempts during maintenance mode are logged in audit logs.

title: Admin Panel Access Restrictions
description: Ensure that only users with admin privileges can access and perform operations in the admin panel.

steps.description: Login as a user without admin rights.
Attempt to access the admin panel URL.
Verify access is denied or redirected appropriately.
Login as an admin user.
Access the admin panel and perform user, role, and unit management operations.
Verify all operations complete successfully and changes are reflected.

title: File Upload with Allowed Formats and Size Limits
description: Validate file upload function accepts authorized file types and respects size limitations.

steps.description: Attempt to upload files of various allowed formats within size limits.
Confirm successful upload and encryption of valid files.
Attempt to upload files exceeding size limits or with disallowed formats.
Verify upload is rejected with proper error messages.

title: Performance Testing for Portal and Unit Switching
description: Ensure portal loads within 2 seconds and switching active units completes within 1 second under load up to 200 concurrent users.

steps.description: Simulate load of 100 to 200 concurrent authenticated users accessing the portal.
Measure and verify portal main page loads within 2 seconds.
Under the same load, perform active unit switching actions.
Confirm unit switching response time is within 1 second.

title: Modular Unit and Content Management
description: Verify system supports adding, modifying, and deleting modular units and content pages without impacting existing functionality.

steps.description: Using admin panel, add a new unit or content module.
Check that the new unit/module is accessible to authorized users and content renders correctly.
Modify and delete existing units or modules.
Verify changes reflect immediately and no disruption occurs in other modules.
